blocks.text: There's an era where all books were reproduced by hand. this led to a beautiful sort of art form: the actual construction, duplication, scripting, and rubrication of these books. this project is a juxtaposition against that and so far as something that appears organic and human-made is actually rendered by machines in technological substrate.

The construction of a modern illuminated manuscript of modern materials and modern technique is an interesting juxtaposition against the idea that these were originally artisanal efforts of maybe hundreds of arduous scholars
Circuit boards are interestingly made of lead, tin, and copper, which are some of the traditional materials that also appeared in ink making, specifically rubrication.
